description: C# program where the vulnerable Import() call exists only in a test helper class (TestCert.cs) with no entry point from Main(). CVE-2023-29331 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: Import() is called in TestCert.TestImport() but that class has no entry point from Main(). Production code never reaches the vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable Import() call exists only in TestCert class which is not reachable from Main(). Production code path never invokes any X509 certificate import functionality.
